# PWA Icons

This directory should contain the following icon files for PWA functionality:

## Required Icons:
- `icon-72x72.png` - 72x72 pixels
- `icon-96x96.png` - 96x96 pixels  
- `icon-128x128.png` - 128x128 pixels
- `icon-144x144.png` - 144x144 pixels
- `icon-152x152.png` - 152x152 pixels
- `icon-192x192.png` - 192x192 pixels
- `icon-384x384.png` - 384x384 pixels
- `icon-512x512.png` - 512x512 pixels

## Shortcut Icons:
- `shortcut-order.png` - 96x96 pixels
- `shortcut-orders.png` - 96x96 pixels
- `shortcut-products.png` - 96x96 pixels

## Screenshots:
- `desktop-screenshot.png` - 1280x720 pixels
- `mobile-screenshot.png` - 375x667 pixels

## Icon Design Guidelines:
- Use the primary color: #4caf50 (green)
- Include a simple POS/cash register icon
- Ensure icons are clear and recognizable at small sizes
- Use consistent design across all sizes
- Consider using a maskable icon format for better Android integration

## Tools to Generate Icons:
- PWA Builder (https://www.pwabuilder.com/imageGenerator)
- RealFaviconGenerator (https://realfavicongenerator.net/)
- Icon Generator (https://iconifier.net/)

## Current Status:
⚠️ **Icons need to be created** - The manifest references these icons but they don't exist yet.
You can use the favicon.ico as a base and generate the required sizes.
